channel.title: Make on Cédric Walter blog
channel.description: Recent content in Make on Cédric Walter blog

item.title: Maven tips and tricks
item.description: Maven tips and tricks. When working with many feature/release/bugfix/hotfix branches, it is a bad idea to start changing the pom version as this will create merge conflicts using pull request.
